Viral Posts · Batch 02 — Premium

20 diverse, premium-palette designs · Nomad CEO brand · personal photos embedded · 1080×1350 IG portrait

⚙ AUTOMATION NOTE (in every caption): Each post designed with Claude Code. Zero manual design clicks. Scheduled + published hands-free via GoHighLevel (scheduler) + n8n (orchestration + cross-posting).
◆ DO HASHTAGS MATTER? (2026 snapshot)
Instagram: Yes — use 10–20 · mix broad + niche + branded. Biggest SEO signal on IG.
LinkedIn: Slight — 3–5 max, specific only. Content beats tags.
X/Twitter: Weak — 1–2 max. Engagement beats tags.
Facebook: Nearly zero — 1–3 for topic labeling only.
Pinterest: Replaced by keyword description — stuff title/desc, not hashtags.
TikTok: Yes — 3–5 niche + 1 trending.

Branded tags used everywhere: #Skynetlabs #Waseemnasir #NomadCEO — builds owned search on every platform + compounds your personal brand discovery.
How to download: Single PNG per card (button), full ZIP, or use Playwright python render_all.py for guaranteed high-res 2160×2700 output (already in ./png/ folder).

19 · newspaper · editorial

"FOUNDER SHIPS 8 PROJECTS IN ONE DAY"

THE NOMAD TIMES

EST. MMXXIV · LAHORE · BALI · LISBON · REMOTE
Founder Ships 8 Projects In One Day.
"I didn't work harder. I deployed agents." — Waseem Nasir, reached by laptop somewhere in Southeast Asia.

In what colleagues are calling "a normal Tuesday," Pakistani-born founder Waseem Nasir shipped an AEO content engine, a LinkedIn autoposter, an Etsy bulk-uploader, and five more systems before noon.

The secret isn't more hours. It's more leverage. Nasir runs 51 n8n nodes, 5 Claude agents, and a Remotion render farm — and sleeps eight hours a night.

"The old play was hire a team," he said. "The new play is wire agents. Same output. Five percent of the cost. None of the ego."
